coverageAdvances: active baseline now reflects accepted agronomic carrier closures
new agronomic carrier concepts are alignment-registered
readiness and hostile-review posture are updated without claiming external standard readiness
preservedBoundaries: external standards as anchors/bindings/exchange surfaces rather than OFARM truth
limitations: AGR-P7 is baseline harmonisation only; it does not provide production runtime execution evidence.
Wire-level standard mappings, live registry verification, and jurisdiction/crop-specific packs remain future implementation/conformance work.
